metadata.description: Skill for drafting individual PRFAQ sections following Mapbox's PRFAQ standard (Working Backwards adapted for Mapbox).

plugins.name: prfaq-write
plugins.description: Write or improve a specific section of a Mapbox PRFAQ (Introduction, Press Release, External FAQ, Internal FAQ, headline, problem, solution, quote, journey) — grounded in evidence, structured to the Mapbox PRFAQ standard, and styled with optional voice profile.
